coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 6:36 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 6:36. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% for 6:36. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 4 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 4:00 at 112-115% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 4:00 at 115%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 4 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/4. 115% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 25% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 4:00 at 115%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/4. 115% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/4. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 4:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 17 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 3:00. Then 21min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 41% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 3:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 49% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 4:00 at 115%. Then 5:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 49% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 49% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 49% done. 115% for 4:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 58% done. 0 intervals left. 12 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

intervals.name: Sub-threshold on tired legs
intervals.instruction: Sub-threshold on tired legs at 92-95% FTP

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 8:00 at 95%. Then 4min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 92-95% FTP, 90-100 rpm. After this: 4min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 8:00 at 95%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 4min to contemplate your life choices. 95% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 95% × 8:00. Give it everything. 4min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 89% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 37 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 89% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 89% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
